
;;;; setup
  !(bind! &var 
    (new-state 0))

[

Deterministic: ()
()]
  (= 
    (increment) 
    (sequential ((do (change-state! &var (+ 1 (get-state &var)))) (get-state &var))))
;;;; call-cleanup! returns result of Form, calls cleanup
  !(assertEqualToResult 
    (sequential ((call-cleanup! (increment) (increment)) (increment))) 
    (1 3))

[

;
;; HYPERON-METTALOG-SANITY.CALL-CLEANUP-TESTS.01

; 
; EVAL TEST
; took 0.002 secs. (2.49 milliseconds) 

  !(assertEqualToResult 
    (sequential ((call-cleanup! (increment) (increment)) (increment))) 
    (1 3))

  (loonit_success  
    (equal_enough_for_test  
      (1 3) 
      (1 3)))


  (= (error  (existence_error  procedure (/  trace_on_pass 0)) (context  (:  system (/   1)) $_5676))  
    (,  
      (eval_H  500 &self 
        (assertEqualToResult 
          (sequential ((call-cleanup! (increment) (increment)) (increment))) 
          (1 3)) $_3552) 
      (,  
        (deterministic  $_3948) 
        (,  
          (xform_out  $_3552 $_3976) 
          (nb_setarg  1 
            (res  $_3332) $_3976)))))




  (= (error  (existence_error  procedure (/  trace_on_pass 0)) (context  (:  system (/   1)) $_5676))  
    (,  
      (eval_H  500 &self 
        (assertEqualToResult 
          (sequential ((call-cleanup! (increment) (increment)) (increment))) 
          (1 3)) $_3552) 
      (,  
        (deterministic  $_3948) 
        (,  
          (xform_out  $_3552 $_3976) 
          (nb_setarg  1 
            (res  $_3332) $_3976)))))

[

Deterministic: (State  0 $_3380)

  (State  0 $_3380)]
;;;; call-cleanup! still calls cleanup if evaluation errors
  !(assertEqualToResult 
    (catch 
      (call-cleanup! 
        (throw foo) 
        (increment)) foo 
      (increment)) 
    (2))

[

;
;; HYPERON-METTALOG-SANITY.CALL-CLEANUP-TESTS.03

; 
; EVAL TEST
; took 0.002 secs. (1.84 milliseconds) 

  !(assertEqualToResult 
    (catch 
      (call-cleanup! 
        (throw foo) 
        (increment)) foo 
      (increment)) 
    (2))

  (loonit_success  
    (equal_enough_for_test  
      (2) 
      (2)))


  (= (error  (existence_error  procedure (/  trace_on_pass 0)) (context  (:  system (/   1)) $_27854))  
    (,  
      (eval_H  500 &self 
        (assertEqualToResult 
          (catch 
            (call-cleanup! 
              (throw foo) 
              (increment)) foo 
            (increment)) 
          (2)) $_3558) 
      (,  
        (deterministic  $_3954) 
        (,  
          (xform_out  $_3558 $_3982) 
          (nb_setarg  1 
            (res  $_3332) $_3982)))))




  (= (error  (existence_error  procedure (/  trace_on_pass 0)) (context  (:  system (/   1)) $_27854))  
    (,  
      (eval_H  500 &self 
        (assertEqualToResult

          (2)) $_3558) 
      (,  
        (deterministic  $_3954) 
        (,  
          (xform_out  $_3558 $_3982) 
          (nb_setarg  1 
            (res  $_3332) $_3982)))))
